summary: Completed frontend testing of Modi's Boutique static marketing website. All major sections load correctly with proper content. One issue found with floating WhatsApp popup button being obscured by Emergent preview badge in the testing environment.

ui_bugs.issue: Floating WhatsApp button popup does not open on click. The Emergent preview badge (id='emergent-badge') overlaps and intercepts pointer events for the floating button at bottom-right. In production without the badge, the button should work. Code logic (useState toggle) is correct but cannot be verified in preview env.

issues: About section says 'Since a Decade' but stats show '15+ Years of Trust' - minor copy inconsistency
Contact form 'Send via WhatsApp' is the submit action - not a traditional form submit. This is by design but may confuse users expecting email confirmation

action_items: Verify floating WhatsApp popup works in production (outside Emergent preview env where badge overlaps the button)
Consider adding z-index or margin to ensure floating button is not obscured in preview/production by any overlay
critical_code_review_comments: FloatingWhatsApp popup toggle works correctly in code but the Emergent badge at bottom-right overlaps the button in the preview environment - this may also affect real users if any overlay is added in future
Contact form submits via WhatsApp (opens wa.me link) - there is no server-side form handling which is fine for a static site
test_credentials: No login required - static marketing website
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static bridal boutique website. All sections verified: Hero (bridal image, 4.6 rating badge, 3 CTA buttons), Sticky header with 6 nav links, Mobile hamburger menu (opens/closes correctly), About section (15+/5000+/500+ stats), Collections bento grid (5 cards), Services (6+ cards), FAQ accordion (10 questions, opens/closes), Contact (address, map embed, WhatsApp form), Footer (nav links + collections). Call links use tel:09709073187, WhatsApp links use wa.me/919709073187. Floating WA button code is correct but popup testing blocked by Emergent badge overlay in preview.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with bridal image, 4.6 rating badge (991 reviews), headline 'Where Every Bride Finds Her Dream', all 3 CTA buttons
Navigation header is sticky with all nav links: Home, About, Collections, Services, FAQ, Contact + Book Appointment
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly with all nav links visible
About section: 15+ years, 5000+ brides, 500+ designs stats present
Collections bento grid: Lehengas, Sarees, Gowns, Suits, Accessories - all 5 found
Testimonials section with prev/next navigation arrows
Contact section: address (Shaheed Chowk), phone, map embed, and contact form
Call Now buttons link to tel:09709073187
Contact form has name, phone, message fields with Send via WhatsApp submit
